en.config.sessionId.tooltip: Jimeng session ID (add prefix us-/hk-/jp-/sg- for international sites)
en.action.textToImage.label: AI Text to Image
en.action.textToImage.description: Generate images from text descriptions using Jimeng AI.
en.action.imageToImage.label: AI Image to Image
en.action.imageToImage.description: Generate new images from input images and text (style transfer, image fusion, etc.).
en.action.textToVideo.label: AI Video Generation
en.action.textToVideo.description: Generate videos from text or images (text-to-video / image-to-video / first-last frame).
